titleStmt.title: SII 17.553: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 553. (A.R. No. 510 of 1904.) KŌḌIYAKKĀḌU, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Amṛitaghaṭēśvara temple.
Palaeographically this inscription may be assigned to the 14th century.

This inscription records an order of the king arranging for the surplus of 55 poṉ, left after spending for the services till the 17th year in the temples of Tirukkōḍikkuḻagar in Umbaḷa-nāḍu and Tiruvagattiyāṉpaḷḷi-uḍaiyār and another 63 poṉ, on which there were some charges, to be utilised as capital for the services, repairs and other services in those temples from the 18th year.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīkoccaṭapaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ Umpaḷa nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkoṭikkuḻakar
koyil tāṉattārum tiruvakattiyāṉpaḷḷi Uṭaiyār koyil tāṉattāru
taṅkaḷ koyil patineḻāvatu varaippūcai mitti Iṟuttupponta
(p)poṉ 5 10 5m Upāti Eṟṟa poṉ 63m patineṭṭāvatu mutal pūjai
kkum tiruppaṇikkun pala nimantaṅkaḷukkum Uṭalāka mutalaṭaṅka kaḻittom
Digital edition of SII 17.553 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
